chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-4888 of 2024 along with C.P. D-1413, D-2692, D-3172, D-3767, D-5773, D-586 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 21723/2024 2. For hearing of main case 06-03-2025 Mr. Pervez Iqbal, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Muhammad Siddiq Advocate holds brief for Sardar Zafar Hussain Advocate for the Respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel the matter is squarely covered vide a judgment of Supreme Court in Civil Appeal Nos. 799 to 824 of 2015 (Additional Collector of Customs Versus M/s K.S. Sulemanji Esmailji and Sons Pvt. Ltd, Karachi). He states that finalization of assessments is pending due to the present petitions. Learned counsel seeks that the department may be directed to finalize the respective assessments in accordance with the law after providing opportunity of hearing to the Petitioners and pending the aforesaid no coercive action be taken against them. Learned counsel further seeks that the fate of the security shall be subject to outcome of the aforesaid. Learned counsel for the Respondent articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed of in above terms. Order accordingly. Office is directed to place copy of this order in connected petitions. Judge Judge Amjad PS
